title: Vivi Faces the Warlord
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on vivi faces the warlord, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Faces the Warlord. The Straw Hats are trapped beneath Rain Dinners as Crocodile prepares to drown them and erase the kingdom’s last hope. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The man responsible for using dance powder and causing the current drought,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I told you to shut up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea... Any idea at all,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How the people of dried up towns felt as they died!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They weren't angry nor did they resent you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They all died belief- ing in you to the very end!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: "It's not the King's fault..." "The King is a wonderful man..."

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even if you have to lie, if you don't insist that you're innocent,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You'd be defilling the memory of all the men and women who died believing you!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: The entire country... even US rebels... we've all wanted nothing more than to hear you say you're innocent...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: That's what we've been fighting for all along!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Watch out! A huge ship's about to crash into port!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: That's what I've wanted to hear...

summary: This part develops vivi faces the warlord and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
